Tests the behavior of Math.pow with a base of 0.3 and an exponent of Infinity.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks the behavior of JavaScript's `Math.pow` function when raising a number to the power of `Infinity`. It verifies that dividing 1 by `Math.pow(0.3, Infinity)` results in `Infinity`. This test ensures that the mathematical operation behaves as expected according to JavaScript's handling of powers and division involving `Infinity`. The code is a single-line script that provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific mathematical operation.
